title: Water Service Connection/Repair - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Utility Assistance > Water Service Connection/Repair 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF ASHLAND REPORT AN ISSUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community members a service to report experiencing or witnessing a suspected city code violation such as an abandoned vehicle, graffiti, power outage or water leak, water system issue, or water quality concern, parking violation on public street, street maintenance or traffic concern, weed abatement issue, and illegal dumping. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm by appoitment only Email (541) 488-6002 Visit Website More Details CITY OF BEND REPORT AN ISSUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community members a service to report experiencing or witnessing a suspected city code violation with a focus on health and safety. Types of issues that can be reported but are not limited to building or land use violations, animal control, illegal dumping or excessive trash, graffiti, street maintenance, camping in the public right of way (including those in vehicles), noise complaints, abandoned vehicles, and public utility issues. 710 NW Wall Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 693-6911 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF PORTLAND CITY OF PORTLAND WATER BUREAU PORTLAND WATER BUREAU CUSTOMER SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Responsible for billing and collecting charges for services provided by the Portland Water Bureau and the Bureau of Environmental Services. Establishes guidelines for program providing low-income assistance with owner-occupied fixture repair costs and utility bill discount. Refers individuals to community service agencies to determine eligibility. 664 N Tillamook Street Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 823-7770 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Electric and water service provider. Fields complaints and calls about utility emergencies. Provides a medical certificate program. May provide assistance or payment plans to customers who are having difficulty paying their utility bills. The Customer Care Program offers a $280 bill credit once per calendar year to eligible customers. 4200 Roosevelt Boulevard Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Electric and water customers: Unrestricted Customer Care Program: EWEB customers that meet income guidelines Hours: Customer Service by phone Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Report power outages and water emergencies 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 685-7000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF BEND REPORT AN ISSUE CITY OF PORTLAND PORTLAND WATER BUREAU CUSTOMER SERVICE EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD
